# requestIdentifier

**Type**

A UUID that uniquely identifies an external purchase report.

## Declaration

```swift
uuid requestIdentifier
```

## Discussion

You generate this identifier when you send a report to the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/Send-External-Purchase-Report] endpoint. Use the same `requestIdentifier` only if you resubmit a report that previously failed. Use a new `requestIdentifier` for each new report, including for reports that correct line items you previously submitted successfully.

Use the `requestIdentifier` to get the report from the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/Retrieve-External-Purchase-Report] endpoint.

## Data types

- **externalPurchaseId**: The unique identifier of an external purchase token.
- **status**: A string value you provide to indicate the status of the token and the contents of the external purchase report.
